title: synth_xilinx miscompilation: outputs are dropped if another output bit is driven 'Z'

features.name: multi_bit_output_with_z_value
features.description: Code should include a multi-bit output wire where some but not all bits are assigned a high-impedance 'Z' value

features.name: synth_xilinx_iopadmap_for_mixed_output
features.description: Code should include a multi-bit output with mixed values that triggers incorrect iopadmap wire assignment during synth_xilinx pass
